categories.description: User-facing View classes and visual UI components such as View, ImageView, Label, and reusable component building blocks.
categories.label: Views & Components

categories.description: Animation APIs, transition helpers, timing, interpolation, and motion-related UI behavior.
categories.label: Animation & Motion

categories.description: Layout containers, layout params, sizing policies, alignment, and positioning.
categories.label: Layout & Sizing

categories.description: Input events, focus, gestures, selectable or interactive behavior, and user interaction helpers.
categories.label: Input & Interaction

categories.description: Image loading, visual rendering, effects, resources, and visual presentation APIs.
categories.label: Images & Visuals

categories.description: Text rendering internals, typography, font handling, text input/editing, and text utility APIs. User-facing display components may belong to Views & Components when they are primarily used as View classes.
categories.label: Text

categories.description: Application, window, lifecycle, adaptor, and app setup APIs.
categories.label: Application Framework

categories.description: Accessibility surfaces, states, roles, highlight, and assistive interfaces.
categories.label: Accessibility

categories.description: Theme, configuration, color systems, style state, and UI customization APIs.
categories.label: Styling, Theme & Configuration

categories.description: General utility types, common helpers, units, math-like support, and shared low-level definitions.
categories.label: Utilities

categories.description: Platform-facing, integration, adaptor, backend, or extension APIs not normally used by app developers.
categories.label: Platform & Integration

categories.description: Fallback category for features that require manual review.
categories.label: Uncategorized

rules: Use only category keys from the provided categories list.
Pick the best category for dali-ui app developer documentation.
If uncertain, still choose the closest category and lower confidence.
prompt_payload.task: Assign each DALi document feature to exactly one category key.
